{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Amberwell madra
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Amberwell madra]] is a type of yellow water madra.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Amberwell madra]] is a type of [[madra]] used by [[Bai Rou]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
